name: libhttp-date-perl
title: libhttp-date-perl
description:
module of date conversion routines
HTTP::Date provides functions that deal the date formats used by the HTTP
protocol (and then some more). Only the first two functions, time2str() and
str2time(), are exported by default.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libhttp-date-perl because module of date conversion routines.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libhttp-date-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libhttp-date-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libhttp-date-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
